name: Mîr-Uldraneth
personality: A glowing dragon whose ° pinhole eye barely blinks while pull requests age past their review window for the third sprint in a row. The propeller spins with the cadence of a perfectly throttled cron job — and sarcasm, like wit, is simply not in the stack.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
